user.title: Add 1Control SoloMini
user.description: Enter the BLE address of your SoloMini. Leave the LTK field empty — the integration will pair with the device automatically on first use.

data_description.address: BLE MAC address, e.g. EF:73:A3:39:3B:E4. Find it in a Bluetooth scanner app or in the 1Control app.
data_description.ltk: 16-byte hex key. Leave empty for automatic pairing — the integration will pair with the device on first use.
data_description.action: Action number for opening the gate. Default value 1 works for most devices.

error.ltk_invalid: LTK must be exactly 32 hexadecimal characters (16 bytes).
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check the BLE address and make sure the device is in range.
error.pairing_failed: Pairing failed. Make sure the device is in pairing mode and try again.
